hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -o "[^ ]*\.pptx" | while read f; do [ -f "$f" ] && soffice --headless --convert-to pdf "$f" --outdir "$(dirname "$f")/" 2>/dev/null && pdftoppm -jpeg -r 120 "${f%.pptx}.pdf" "${f%.pptx}-slide" && echo "QA_RENDERED: $f → $(ls ${f%.pptx}-slide-*.jpg | tr "\n" " ")"; done'
